features.name: continuous assignment inlined into always block with ordering dependency
features.description: Code should include a continuous assignment assigning a wire to another wire, and an always @(*) block that assigns to the source wire before reading the destination wire, creating an ordering dependency that changes simulation semantics when inlined

features.name: self-referential wire via continuous assignment read in always block
features.description: Code should include a wire driven by continuous assignment that is read within an always block where the source wire is also assigned blocking before the read
